command:
echo "waiting for postgres:5432..."
until nc -z postgres 5432; do sleep 2; done
echo "postgres is reachable"
initContainers.name: wait-for-postgres

command:
echo "waiting for postgres, redis, kafka, cassandra, and apps..."
until nc -z postgres 5432; do sleep 2; done
until nc -z redis 6379; do sleep 2; done
until nc -z kafka 9092; do sleep 2; done
until nc -z cassandra 9042; do sleep 2; done
until nc -z apps 18086; do sleep 2; done
echo "all dependencies are reachable"
initContainers.name: wait-for-dependencies

command:
set -e
until /usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --list >/dev/null 2>&1; do
  echo "waiting for kafka..."
  sleep 3
done
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic msg.ingress.v1 --partitions 12 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic msg.persisted.v1 --partitions 12 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic msg.delivery.v1 --partitions 6 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic msg.sms.dispatch.v1 --partitions 3 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic presence.events.v1 --partitions 6 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic microservice.events.v1 --partitions 12 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic msg.ingress.dlq.v1 --partitions 3 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic msg.delivery.dlq.v1 --partitions 3 --replication-factor 1
/usr/bin/kafka-topics --bootstrap-server kafka:9092 --create --if-not-exists --topic msg.sms.dlq.v1 --partitions 3 --replication-factor 1
containers.name: kafka-init

command:
echo "waiting for postgres, redis, kafka, and cassandra..."
until nc -z postgres 5432; do sleep 2; done
until nc -z redis 6379; do sleep 2; done
until nc -z kafka 9092; do sleep 2; done
until nc -z cassandra 9042; do sleep 2; done
echo "all dependencies are reachable"
initContainers.name: wait-for-dependencies
